Envestero.decision_point: Kira peer review + Toan approval needed on Intelligence Model architecture (3 phases, 9-12h)
Envestero.summary: PIVOT: Build Intelligence Model (executives + consumer sentiment + influence network) instead of traditional fundamentals. Phase 1C.1: Executive data (2-3h). Phase 1C.2: Consumer sentiment (3-4h). Phase 1C.3: Influence detection (4-5h). Uses existing APIs (free), builds on current OHLCV + sentiment. Predictive advantage: detect market moves 3-5 days early via leadership + consumer changes. Waiting for Kira review (PEER_REVIEW_KIRA.md) then Toan decision.
